name: Salvage Hunters Best Buys
overview: Architectural salvage expert Drew Pritchard looks back at the most eccentric characters, the hardest hagglers and the most extraordinary places he's hunted for antique treasure. Drew gives us the inside track on his wheeling and dealing, the stories behind his picks, as well as top tips about salvaging and how to get the best deals.

trailers.title: *EXCLUSIVE TO QUEST* Salvage Hunters: Best Buys begins Wednesday 18th May, 9pm
